/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libhercules_posix.so -o libhercules_posix.so CMakeFiles/hercules_posix.dir/imss_posix.c.o CMakeFiles/hercules_posix.dir/mapfd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hercules_posix.dir/flags.c.o CMakeFiles/hercules_posix.dir/resolvepath.c.o CMakeFiles/hercules_posix.dir/__/fuse/map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hercules_posix.dir/__/src/slog.c.o CMakeFiles/hercules_posix.dir/__/src/cfg_parse.c.o   -L/home/gabrielo/Documents/hercules/build/app  -Wl,-rpath,/home/gabrielo/Documents/hercules/scripts/app:/home/gabrielo/Documents/hercules/build/app: -lglib-2.0 libhercules_posix_api.a ../app/libimss_shared.so -ldl -g -fbounds-check -Wl,--no-undefined -lglib-2.0 -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libucp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libucs.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libhiredis.so
